text:
Two attempts over an hour with nothing in spam either points to either a delivery delay or the reset going to a different email than the one on file. Confirm the exact email address you're using for the reset — if it doesn't match what's on your account, that's likely the issue.

If it does match, add noreply@novig.us (or whatever address the reset emails come from) to your contacts and try once more. If it still doesn't land, we'll route this to get your identity verified and the reset handled directly.

Novig Support
